message:
feat(collect): Implement cgroup, systemd, and container collection modules

- Add cgroup.rs: Comprehensive cgroup v1/v2 parsing with CPU quota,
  memory limits, and systemd slice/unit extraction from paths
- Add systemd.rs: Unit detection via systemctl show with active state,
  main PID tracking, and cgroup path fallback
- Add container.rs: Docker, containerd, podman, LXC, and Kubernetes
  container detection from cgroup paths with ID extraction
- Export new types from collect/mod.rs

30 unit tests covering all major parsing scenarios.

Closes process_triage-urd

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
